message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Need your consent on Task #1">
Task #1 needs your review for consensus. 6 of 8 reviewers have consented. Please read the changes in commit fe1009a (static/js/password-toggle.js and tests/api/register.rs) and send your consent or concerns.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already reviewed and consented to this commit. Let me resend to make sure it's recorded.

input.content:
I already reviewed commit fe1009a and sent my consent earlier. To confirm clearly:

**I consent** to Task #1 (fe1009a -- password toggle hidden input mirror fix).

My full review was sent in my previous message. Summary: clean, minimal fix with symmetric state transitions, test added for the mechanism, no TDD discipline concerns.
